_comment: Screenshot manifest. Status: placeholder | draft | stale | approved. See docs/screenshot-automation.md.

homepageHero.alt: Marker scorecard showing an active golf round
homepageHero.notes: Expo screenshot. Visual, accuracy, and privacy review completed Jul 2026. Home screen for demo account Bob Smith, no USGA ID connected. Recent Scorecards show Pebble Beach GL rounds with first names Greg/Larry/Mike/Bob and Bob/Joe/Greg/Harry. Recent Events shows PebblePayday. All fictional demo data. No personal data.

homepageLeaderboard.alt: Live leaderboard showing player standings during a golf round
homepageLeaderboard.notes: Expo screenshot. Visual, accuracy, and privacy review completed Jul 2026. Scorecard-level leaderboard in PebblePayday event (breadcrumb PebblePayday > Leaderboard) with Round in progress badge and Event Games > Team Stroke Play standings. Four teams with front/back/total/$ columns. All names fictional: Debbie Dogleg, Ben Birdie, Bert Bailout, Kevin Kickin, Tom Triple, George Green, Joe Jar, Harry Hazard, Bob Smith, Greg Gimme, Larry Lateral, Mike Mulligan. No personal data. Appropriate for homepage product illustration.

homepageGames.alt: Add game screen in Marker listing all eleven available game formats with one-line descriptions
homepageGames.notes: Expo screenshot. Visual, accuracy, and privacy review completed Jul 2026. Add game picker showing SELECT GAME list with all 11 formats: High-Low, Match Play, Nassau, Nines (5-3-1), Scotch (PREMIUM), Skins, Stableford, Stroke Play, Team Stableford (PREMIUM), Team Stroke Play, Wolf (PREMIUM). No player names or personal data visible.

tutorialCreateEventStep1.alt: Course search step of the Create Event flow in Marker, showing a search field with the query pinehur and a list of 16 matching courses
tutorialCreateEventStep1.caption: Search by course name — Marker's database includes hole-by-hole data for thousands of courses.
tutorialCreateEventStep1.notes: Expo screenshot. Shows course search with 'pinehur' query and 16 matching courses. No personal data. Reviewed and approved.

tutorialCreateEventStep2.alt: Completed Create Event form in Marker showing a selected course, an event name, a date, and the Save button
tutorialCreateEventStep2.caption: With course, name, and date filled in, tap Save to create the event.
tutorialCreateEventStep2.notes: Expo screenshot. Shows fully completed form: course No. 2, event name Pinehurst Pandemonium, date 07/06/2026, Save button. All fictional demo data. Series picker not shown — demo account is not a commissioner. Reviewed and approved.

tutorialCreateEventStep3.alt: Marker event dashboard for a newly created event showing empty Players, Scorecards, and Games sections each with an add button
tutorialCreateEventStep3.caption: Your event is ready — add players, create scorecards, and configure games in any order.
tutorialCreateEventStep3.notes: Expo screenshot. Empty event dashboard immediately after creation: Players 0, Scorecards 0, Games 0, each with + button. Event name Pinehurst Pandemonium is fictional demo data. Reviewed and approved.

eventAddPlayersPicker.alt: Event Add Players screen showing 5 players selected as chips above a Recent Partners list with 5 of 10 partners checked and a Continue (5) button
eventAddPlayersPicker.caption: Tap past partners to check them off — select your whole group before tapping Continue.
eventAddPlayersPicker.notes: Event player picker in multi-select state. 5 of 10 recent partners selected: Bert Bailout, Ben Birdie, Debbie Dogleg, Paul Press, Bob Smith. Invite new player link visible in section header. All fictional golf-themed demo names. No personal data.

eventAddPlayersTees.alt: Set Tees screen showing a Men's tee picker with White selected and a Women's tee section with Blue and White options visible
eventAddPlayersTees.caption: Set a default tee for each gender in the selected batch — individual players can be adjusted later from the event dashboard.
eventAddPlayersTees.notes: Event bulk tee assignment screen. Men's tee: Championship, Green, Blue, White (selected, green highlight), Brown, Gold, Fairway Tees — all with yardage, rating, and slope. Women's tee section visible with Blue and White; selection is below the visible fold. Back and Save buttons at bottom. No personal data; course is fictional demo data. Tees apply only to the current batch of newly added players.

eventScorecardsTeeTimes.alt: Add Event Scorecard screen with Tee Times selected, showing Start time 08:30 AM, Start hole 1, Number of groups 4, Spacing (minutes) 10, and a Save (4) button
eventScorecardsTeeTimes.caption: For tee-time starts, set the first group's start time, starting hole, number of groups, and spacing — Marker calculates each group's tee time automatically.
eventScorecardsTeeTimes.notes: Add Event Scorecard form in Tee Times mode. Section label reads TEE TIME (singular). Start time 08:30 AM, Start hole 1, Number of groups 4 (highlighted), Tee Times toggle selected (green), Spacing (minutes) 10, Save (4) button. Spacing field is visible in Tee Times mode and hidden in Shotgun mode. No preview text in Tee Times mode. No personal data.

eventScorecardsShotgun.alt: Add Event Scorecard screen with Shotgun Start selected, Start hole 17, and a preview reading 'This will add groups starting at 8:30 AM on holes: 17, 18, 1, 2'
eventScorecardsShotgun.caption: For a shotgun start, Marker previews the exact hole assignments before you save — starting at hole 17 with 4 groups wraps around through holes 18, 1, and 2.
eventScorecardsShotgun.notes: Add Event Scorecard form in Shotgun Start mode. Start time 08:30 AM, Start hole 17 (highlighted), Number of groups 4, Shotgun Start toggle selected (green). Spacing (minutes) field is not shown in Shotgun mode. Preview text visible: 'This will add groups starting at 8:30 AM on holes: 17, 18, 1, 2' — demonstrates consecutive hole assignment with wraparound from hole 18 back to hole 1. Save (4) button. No personal data.

eventScorecardsPlayerAssignment.alt: Edit Event Scorecard screen showing the Players section with four checked players assigned to this scorecard and five unchecked unassigned event players listed below
eventScorecardsPlayerAssignment.caption: Check players from the unassigned pool to add them to this scorecard — players already on other scorecards are not shown as candidates.
eventScorecardsPlayerAssignment.notes: Edit Event Scorecard screen. Scorecard tee time 08:50 AM, Start hole 1. PLAYERS section shows 4 checked (Mike Mulligan White Tees C.H. 13, Harry Hazard White Tees C.H. 2, Allan Albatross White Tees C.H. 15, Joe Jar White Tees C.H. 14) and 5 visible unchecked unassigned event players (Debbie Dogleg Red Tees C.H. 5, Dave Divot White Tees C.H. 27, George Green White Tees C.H. 41, Tom Triple White Tees C.H. 10, Kevin Kickin White Tees C.H. 18). List may continue below the fold. Save button visible; Remove Group action is not visible in this frame. All names are fictional golf-themed demo data. No personal data.

eventGamesPicker.alt: Add game screen showing all 11 game formats in the SELECT GAME list, with Premium badges on Scotch, Team Stableford, and Wolf
eventGamesPicker.caption: Tap any format to open its configuration — formats marked Premium require an active subscription.
eventGamesPicker.notes: Event game picker. All 11 formats visible: High-Low, Match Play, Nassau, Nines (5-3-1), Scotch, Skins, Stableford, Stroke Play, Team Stableford, Team Stroke Play, Wolf. Premium badges on Scotch, Team Stableford, and Wolf. Captured from the Event game-management workflow using fictional demo Event data. No personal data.

eventGamesConfiguration.alt: Skins game configuration screen showing Handicap set to Net and the Players section listing 15 Event players, with five of six visible players checked
eventGamesConfiguration.caption: Configure handicap, select participants from the Event roster, and save — the player list shows everyone in your event.
eventGamesConfiguration.notes: Event Skins game configuration. 'Players (15)' heading confirms the full Event roster is available. Net selected; P.H. visible for checked players; Stroke off the low ball unchecked so S.O. not shown. 6 players visible: Mike Mulligan White Tees C.H. 13 P.H. 13 (checked), Harry Hazard White Tees C.H. 2 P.H. 2 (checked), Allan Albatross White Tees C.H. 15 (unchecked, no P.H.), Joe Jar White Tees C.H. 14 P.H. 14 (checked), Debbie Dogleg Red Tees C.H. 5 P.H. 5 (checked), Dave Divot (partially visible, checked). Skins-specific settings are below the visible frame. Save game button at bottom. All names are fictional golf-themed demo data. No personal data.

eventScoringLiveLeaderboard.alt: Event leaderboard for PebblePayday showing Team Stroke Play standings for four teams with an Event in progress badge
eventScoringLiveLeaderboard.caption: Follow Event standings while groups are still playing — the Event leaderboard shows results across all teams.
eventScoringLiveLeaderboard.notes: Recaptured Jul 2026 to show the Event-level leaderboard (trophy icon from event dashboard). Title 'Leaderboard', event header PebblePayday Jul 10 2026 Pebble Beach GL, 'Event in progress' badge (yellow pill). Team Stroke Play card: Kevin Kickin/Bert Bailout/Ben Birdie/Debbie Dogleg (#1, ✓18, -5, -4, -9, $640); Harry Hazard/Joe Jar/George Green/Tom Triple (#2, ✓18, -4, -3, -7, $0); Mike Mulligan/Larry Lateral/Greg Gimme/Bob Smith (#3, 18, -2, +3, +1, $0); Paul Press/Dave Divot/Edward Eagle/Allan Albatross (#4, 18, -1, +4, +3, $0). All names fictional demo data. No personal data.

eventCompleteConfirm.alt: Complete event confirmation sheet on the Marker event dashboard explaining that scorecards lock and per-game results freeze, with a Complete event button
eventCompleteConfirm.caption: Tap Complete event from the event dashboard — all scorecards lock and per-game results freeze.
eventCompleteConfirm.notes: Recaptured Jul 2026 to show the event-level Complete event confirmation modal. Background is event dashboard ('Event' title, gear icon) for PebblePayday Jul 10 2026 showing Players · 16 with player list. Modal: title 'Complete event' (green), body 'By completing this event, you attest that the scores are correct. Scorecards lock and per-game results freeze. You can unlock later if you need to make changes.', confirm button 'Complete event' (dark green). Visible player names: Allan Albatross, Bert Bailout, Ben Birdie, Dave Divot, Debbie Dogleg — all fictional demo data. No personal data.

eventCompleteFinalSettlement.alt: Event total section of the Event leaderboard showing the Settlement tab with Buy-ins collected checked and pot payouts to eight players
eventCompleteFinalSettlement.caption: Event total combines all Event Game results — Settlement shows who receives what from the pot.
eventCompleteFinalSettlement.notes: Shows the Event total section of the leaderboard in Settlement view. Top of frame shows bottom rows of a game standings card: Team 3 (Bob Smith, Greg Gimme, Larry Lateral, Mike Mulligan, THRU 18, 91, $0) and Team 4 (Allan Albatross, Edward Eagle, Dave Divot, Paul Press, THRU 18, 91, $0). Event total section: Settlement tab active (dark green), Profit / loss tab inactive. Buy-ins collected checkbox (checked, green) with description 'Settle from the pot for buy-in games, then between players for the rest.' FROM / TO / AMOUNT table: Pot→Bert Bailout $320, Pot→George Green $240, Pot→Kevin Kickin $160, Pot→Ben Birdie $160, Pot→Debbie Dogleg $160, Pot→Harry Hazard $80, Pot→Joe Jar $80, Pot→Tom Triple $80. Share leaderboard button at bottom. All names fictional golf-themed demo data. No personal data.

gameWolfSetup.alt: Wolf game setup screen in Marker showing the lone wolf assignment for a hole
gameWolfSetup.caption: The wolf chooses their partner (or goes alone) before anyone else tees off.
gameWolfSetup.notes: No game guide page currently renders this key. Placeholder reserved for future Wolf game guide screenshot. Replace after Wolf game screen is stable. Show hole view with wolf selection prompt.

gameNassauSetup.alt: Nassau game configuration in Marker showing match amounts for front, back, and full 18
gameNassauSetup.caption: Set separate match amounts for front 9, back 9, and the full 18.
gameNassauSetup.notes: No game guide page currently renders this key. Placeholder reserved for future Nassau game guide screenshot. Replace after Nassau configuration is stable. Show the three-bet setup form.

gameSkinsPayout.alt: Skins payout screen in Marker showing hole-by-hole skin winners and carry amounts
gameSkinsPayout.caption: Skins accumulate when a hole is halved — Marker tracks every carry automatically.
gameSkinsPayout.notes: No game guide page currently renders this key. Placeholder reserved for future Skins game guide screenshot. Replace after Skins results screen is stable. Show a game with several carries.

commissionersHero.alt: Marker event overview showing four scorecard groups with tee times, multiple game formats including Skins and Team Stroke Play, and centralized commissioner controls for managing a tournament
commissionersHero.notes: Expo screenshot. Visual, accuracy, and privacy review completed Jul 2026. Event dashboard for PebblePayday showing SCORECARDS · 4 with tee times and player first names (Mike/Greg/Bob/Larry at 8:00, Kevin/Debbie/Ben/Bert at 8:30, Harry/Joe/Tom/George at 8:20, Dave/Allan/Edward/Paul at 8:10) and GAMES · 4 (Skins, Stroke Play, Team Stroke Play, Team Stableford — all 16 players). Republish scorecards link and Complete event CTA visible. All names fictional demo data. No personal data.

commissionersLiveScoring.alt: Live event leaderboard in Marker showing multiple teams in a Team Stroke Play event with front and back scoring, total standings, and accounting values during a round in progress
commissionersLiveScoring.notes: Expo screenshot. Visual, accuracy, and privacy review completed Jul 2026. Scorecard-level leaderboard in PebblePayday event (breadcrumb PebblePayday > Leaderboard) with Round in progress badge and Event Games > Team Stroke Play standings. Teams: Debbie Dogleg/Ben Birdie/Bert Bailout/Kevin Kickin (#1, ✓18, -5/-4, -9, $640); Tom Triple/George Green/Joe Jar/Harry Hazard (#2, ✓18, -4/-3, -7, $0); Bob Smith/Greg Gimme/Larry Lateral/Mike Mulligan (#3, 18, -2/+3, +1, $0); Allan (partial, #4). All names fictional demo data. No personal data. Appropriate for commissioner page product illustration.

commissionersSettlement.alt: Event settlement screen in Marker showing buy-ins collected, payouts distributed from the pot to winners, profit and loss per player, and calculated payment amounts
commissionersSettlement.notes: Expo screenshot. Visual, accuracy, and privacy review completed Jul 2026. Event leaderboard bottom section: Team 3 (Bob Smith/Greg Gimme/Larry Lateral/Mike Mulligan, 18, 91, $0) and Team 4 (Allan Albatross/Edward Eagle/Dave Divot/Paul Press, 17, 85, $0). Event total: Settlement tab active, Buy-ins collected checked. Pot payouts: Bert Bailout $480, George Green $240, Tom Triple $240, Kevin Kickin $160, Ben Birdie $160, Debbie Dogleg $160, Harry Hazard $80, Joe Jar $80. Share leaderboard button. All names fictional demo data. No personal data.

followGamesNassauScorecard.alt: Nassau game selected on a Marker scorecard showing live match status and presses during the round
followGamesNassauScorecard.caption: Switch between game tabs to follow each game as scores are entered.
followGamesNassauScorecard.notes: Active-round standalone scorecard with Nassau selected. Demonstrates the game-specific scorecard column and live match status.

followGamesLiveLeaderboard.alt: Marker live leaderboard showing Net Skins standings and Nassau match results during an active round
followGamesLiveLeaderboard.caption: The Leaderboard brings every game's standings together in one view.
followGamesLiveLeaderboard.notes: Active-round standalone leaderboard showing multiple configured games and Round in progress state.

followGamesDayTotal.alt: Marker Day total showing current settlement transactions across games during an active round
followGamesDayTotal.caption: Day total combines the current accounting impact of all games on the scorecard.
followGamesDayTotal.notes: Active-round Day total in Settlement view. Values remain provisional while the round is in progress.

reviewResultsEndRound.alt: Marker End round confirmation explaining that ending the round locks the scorecard
reviewResultsEndRound.caption: Ending the round locks the scorecard and finalizes the game results. You can unlock it later from scorecard settings if a correction is needed.
reviewResultsEndRound.notes: Standalone scorecard End round confirmation state. Demonstrates the transition from provisional results to locked final results.

reviewResultsFinalSettlement.alt: Marker final Day total showing settlement transactions after a completed round
reviewResultsFinalSettlement.caption: The final Day total shows exactly who pays whom across all games on the scorecard.
reviewResultsFinalSettlement.notes: Final standalone scorecard Day total in Settlement view after the round is locked.

createScorecardNewGame.alt: Marker home screen showing the New Game and Host Event options for starting a round
createScorecardNewGame.caption: Tap New Game to start a standalone scorecard for your group.
createScorecardNewGame.notes: Home screen with New Game (1-5 players) and Host Event (6+ players) buttons. Demo account Bob Smith. No personal data visible.

createScorecardSelectCourse.alt: Create scorecard flow in Marker showing the course search screen with results for Shinnecock
createScorecardSelectCourse.caption: Choose the course for your round.
createScorecardSelectCourse.notes: Course selection step of scorecard creation. Search query 'shinnecock' showing 2 matching courses. No tee selection visible on this screen.

createScorecardSetup.alt: Add Player screen in Marker showing name, handicap index, gender, and tee selection for a player
createScorecardSetup.caption: Marker takes you into player setup — confirm your handicap, gender, and tee before continuing.
createScorecardSetup.notes: Player settings panel showing demo player Bob Smith, handicap 4.7, Male selected, tee options with Blue/White selected. Fictional demo data.

addPlayersPlayerPicker.alt: Marker Add Player screen showing a list of ten recent playing partners and a search field for filtering by name
addPlayersPlayerPicker.caption: Choose from people you've played with before, or use search to filter your playing-partner list.
addPlayersPlayerPicker.notes: Shows 'Select past partners' section with 'Search players' field and 'RECENT PARTNERS · 10' list. Invite player link visible top-right. All names are fictional demo data. Search filters the user's playing-partner history only — not a global Marker user search.

addPlayersInvitePlayer.alt: Blank Add Player form in Marker showing fields for mobile number, name, handicap index, gender, and tee when adding a new playing partner
addPlayersInvitePlayer.caption: Enter a name, handicap, and tee for someone new — adding a phone number shares the scorecard with them by text.
addPlayersInvitePlayer.notes: Blank player settings form (Adjust player settings) reached via Invite player. Shows Add/find by mobile number field, Name (First/Last), Handicap index (0), Handicap Settings (Male/Female), and Tee list (Red/Green/Blue visible). Save button at bottom.

addGamesGamePicker.alt: Marker Add Game screen listing all eleven available game formats with one-line descriptions, and Premium badges on Scotch, Team Stableford, and Wolf
addGamesGamePicker.caption: Choose the game your group wants to play.
addGamesGamePicker.notes: Standalone scorecard game picker. Shows SELECT GAME list with all 11 formats: High-Low, Match Play, Nassau, Nines (5-3-1), Scotch (Premium), Skins, Stableford, Stroke Play, Team Stableford (Premium), Team Stroke Play, Wolf (Premium). No search or category filters visible.

scoreRoundMainScorecard.alt: Marker scorecard showing players, hole scores, handicap indicators, and game status during a round
scoreRoundMainScorecard.caption: Enter scores in the grid and Marker updates the scorecard and game status as the round progresses.
scoreRoundMainScorecard.notes: Active Nassau scorecard on Shinnecock Hills. Shows four players (BS, AA, BB, EE) split into Side A/B teams, holes 1–5 scored with gross/net stacked display, handicap dot indicators, birdie circles, and the Nassau game-status column with front/press/total match rows and press pills.

addGamesGameConfiguration.alt: Nassau configuration screen in Marker showing the Handicap section set to Net with Stroke off the low ball checked, all four players selected with tee and course handicap details, and the Teams section partially visible at the bottom
addGamesGameConfiguration.caption: Each game's form shows handicap controls at the top, the full player list with tee and course handicap details, and game-specific settings below.
addGamesGameConfiguration.notes: Nassau configuration. Shows Handicap (Net selected, Gross available, Stroke off the low ball checked, show advanced link), Players (4) with all checked (Bob Smith, Allan Albatross, Bert Bailout, Edward Eagle — Blue/White tee with C.H./P.H./S.O. values), Teams (Side A vs Side B partially visible). Save game button at bottom. Accounting fields not visible in this capture.

welcomeMarkerHome.alt: Marker Home screen showing player name, Connect USGA ID button, New Game and Host Event tiles, and recent scorecards and events
welcomeMarkerHome.caption: The Home screen is your starting point for a New Game, a larger Event, or returning to recent play.
welcomeMarkerHome.notes: Signed-in Home screen for demo account Bob Smith without a connected USGA ID. Hero shows player name and Connect USGA ID button (no handicap index or club visible). New Game (1-5 players) and Host Event (6+ players) tiles visible. Three recent scorecards and two recent events visible with fictional demo data.

setupProfileEdit.alt: Marker profile edit form showing Phone, Email, USGA Handicap ID, Name, and Handicap Settings fields with a Save button
setupProfileEdit.caption: Complete your player information here and optionally connect your USGA Handicap ID.
setupProfileEdit.notes: Profile Edit screen using fictitious demo data (Bob Smith, (000) 555-0001, bob@testgolfer.org). USGA Handicap ID field is empty — no validated USGA identity shown. Handicap Settings (Male/Female) is visible because no USGA ID is connected. Save button visible at bottom.

handicapsGameSettings.alt: Marker game handicap settings showing Net scoring, stroke off the low ball, handicap allowance, and advanced handicap options
handicapsGameSettings.caption: Choose Net scoring, then adjust the handicap allowance and advanced stroke settings for the game.
handicapsGameSettings.notes: Game configuration handicap section with Net selected, Stroke off the low ball checkbox, and show advanced expanded to reveal Handicap Allowance, Limit Playing Handicap, Use half strokes, No strokes on par 3's, and Override player handicaps options.

handicapsScorecardIndicators.alt: Marker scorecard showing handicap stroke indicators in player score cells
handicapsScorecardIndicators.caption: Dots show strokes received on a hole; a plus sign shows a stroke the player gives back.
handicapsScorecardIndicators.notes: Scorecard mid-round showing dot (•) indicators for strokes received and plus (+) indicators for strokes given back in the top corner of score cells.
